command_log.command: echo '## Worker Assignment' && cat assignment.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{"task": "default task"}'

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.863" && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && WORKFLOW=$(cat "workflows/tests/team-sub-worker.json") && WF_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.name') && STEP_COUNT=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps | length') && FIRST_STEP_ID=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].id') && FIRST_STEP_TYPE=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].type') && echo "Workflow '$WF_NAME' started ($STEP_COUNT steps)." && echo "First step: $FIRST_STEP_ID ($FIRST_STEP_TYPE)" && STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true) && if [[ -n "$STATE_FILE" && -f "$STATE_FILE" ]]; then CURRENT_CURSOR=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$STATE_FILE") && CURRENT_STEP_ID=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r --argjson idx "$CURRENT_CURSOR" '.steps[$idx].id // "complete"') && echo "State file: $(basename $STATE_FILE)" && echo "Cursor at: $CURRENT_CURSOR ($CURRENT_STEP_ID)"; fi
